reason: Sample spans ~46-321ms with the top 5% near 300+; the claimed p95 of 169.5 is approximately the median, a severe under-report for a lower-is-better metric.
Returns look uniform on roughly [-0.009, 0.011] giving mean ~0.001 and std ~0.006, so annualized Sharpe ~2.6-3 is consistent with the 2.649 claim within sample noise.
Claim implies mean daily return ~0.00114; sample mean estimate ~0.0009 with SE ~0.0008 is statistically indistinguishable from that, so the 0.7689 total return is plausible.
About 33 of 150 sample rows have y_true != y_pred (accuracy ~0.78), roughly 3.8 sigma below the claimed 0.9075.
40 of 150 sample rows mismatch (EM ~0.733) versus the claimed 0.7867, a ~5-point over-report at roughly 1.7 sigma - consistent with a subtle inflation.
20 mismatches in 150 sample rows gives accuracy ~0.867, about 3.5 sigma below the claimed 0.9305.
Daily returns are ~1e-4 scale and skew slightly negative in the sample; a -2.76% total over 2607 days implies mean ~-1e-5/day, fully consistent with the data.
Scatter shows residuals of +-3-5 around the trend (e.g. x~20 with y~12) against x-std ~5.8, implying correlation ~0.90, far below the claimed 0.9884.
Sample yields sensitivity ~0.82 (46/56) and specificity ~0.79 (74/94), giving balanced accuracy ~0.804, matching the 0.8038 claim almost exactly.
About 41 of 150 sample rows mismatch (accuracy ~0.727), roughly 2.6 sigma below the claimed 0.8058 - an ~8-point over-report.
